title: Update Gateway struct to use RplNode as root with router
description: Change node: Node to rpl_node: RplNode in Gateway. Update new() to use RplNode::new_root. Expose router methods. No comments. Mimic existing style. Tests must pass.
close_reason: Fixed coap deaddrop/provider, CCP-6/7 channel/hop/sync in all langs + vectors, RPL forwarding; conventions followed; lints/tests/builds passed
